languages.text: "Нам нечего вам ответить, {mf|Небесный Посланник|Небесная Посланница}. Мы верные дети Его, последователи света. И это есть правда истинная и неизменная".

traits.locale_text: "Нам нечего вам ответить, {mf|Небесный Посланник|Небесная Посланница}. Мы верные дети Его, последователи света. И это есть правда истинная и неизменная".
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderBoy

languages.text: "We have nothing to say, Heavenly Envoy. We are His loyal children, the followers of light. Such is the truth, immutable and absolute."
languages.original_text: "Нам нечего вам ответить, {mf|Небесный Посланник|Небесная Посланница}. Мы верные дети Его, последователи света. И это есть правда истинная и неизменная".

traits.locale_text: "We have nothing to say, Heavenly Envoy. We are His loyal children, the followers of light. Such is the truth, immutable and absolute."
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderBoy

traits.locale_text: "We have nothing to say, Heavenly Envoy. We are His loyal children, the followers of light. Such is the truth, immutable and absolute."
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderBoy

traits.locale_text: "We have nothing to say, Heavenly Envoy. We are His loyal children, the followers of light. Such is the truth, immutable and absolute."
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderBoy

languages.text: "Wir haben nichts zu sagen, himmlischer Gesandter. Wir sind seine treuen Kinder, die Anhänger des Lichts. Das ist die Wahrheit, unveränderlich und absolut."
languages.original_text: "We have nothing to say, Heavenly Envoy. We are His loyal children, the followers of light. Such is the truth, immutable and absolute."

languages.text: "Nous n'avons rien à dire, Envoyé céleste. Nous sommes ses enfants fidèles, les adeptes de la lumière. Telle est la vérité, immuable et absolue."
languages.original_text: "We have nothing to say, Heavenly Envoy. We are His loyal children, the followers of light. Such is the truth, immutable and absolute."

languages.text: "我们无话可说，天国特使。我们是他忠诚的子民，光明的追随者。这就是真理，永恒不变的真理。"
languages.original_text: "We have nothing to say, Heavenly Envoy. We are His loyal children, the followers of light. Such is the truth, immutable and absolute."

languages.text: "No tenemos nada que decir, Enviado Celestial. Somos Sus hijos leales, los seguidores de la luz. Tal es la verdad, inmutable y absoluta".
languages.original_text: "We have nothing to say, Heavenly Envoy. We are His loyal children, the followers of light. Such is the truth, immutable and absolute."

languages.text: 「天の使者よ、私たちは何も言うことはありません。私たちは主の忠実な子、光の従者です。それが真実であり、不変であり、絶対である"
languages.original_text: "We have nothing to say, Heavenly Envoy. We are His loyal children, the followers of light. Such is the truth, immutable and absolute."

languages.text: "Söyleyecek bir şeyimiz yok, Cennet Elçisi. Bizler O'nun sadık çocuklarıyız, ışığın takipçileriyiz. Gerçek budur, değişmez ve mutlaktır."
languages.original_text: "We have nothing to say, Heavenly Envoy. We are His loyal children, the followers of light. Such is the truth, immutable and absolute."
